{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603201657282C7E867DAA09873D9580"}"},"total":919},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7522438732808569662","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"这算是天幕文中比较好的一本书了，至少作者确实认真写了，作者叙述的历史内容，先不管对不对，人家能给你诉说出处，从哪些史书里的内容，比那些纯谣言野史的天幕文强百倍了，上初中的时候学校发课本后大概浏览了下，然后就拿出历史书开始看，感觉跟看故事一样，只不过书内容不多，也就不到一厘米厚的书就把五千年历史概括了，当时还疑惑咋就这点内容呢，五千年啊！进入社会看的书多了明白了，建国前没啥正史，都是野史，最多就是官方野史，明白为啥历史书那么薄了，估计作者都实在不知道怎么写，因为你说参考所谓已有的正史书籍吧，逻辑性有时候不如野史逻辑通顺，而教育这东西也不能拿野史教育学生吧，所以大概写个脉络其他学生自己查找和思考去好了。所以就明白了，别纠结所谓正史野史，你看了有啥思考，学到了什么才重要，其他的纠结起来没意义。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1751462015,"group_id":"7503227409445964824","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"单机日更30000字，不会作诗也会吟","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N6SY+pZrGuBv8WGS+T+A3hE=","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/7b92beed15144f519898bfe689051d51~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"6811584265","user_name":"叠千纸鹤送小日子"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"6811584265","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":true,"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"svip","icon":"{"icon_default_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/07d37b2c30d271228698f77f4f7f7daf","icon_dark_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/d67f15fefbb4470bb54c773eb84e90d8","icon_width":26,"icon_height":16}","intro":"{"title_name":"svip","title_id":"svip","icon_type":1}","is_author_title":false,"is_vip_title":true,"zh_title":"svip"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7503227409445964824","book_info":{"abstract":"李恩凡站在讲台之上，平静的说道：“在历史的长河之下，虽然有些我们感觉是偶然的事件。
但在当时社会环境，以及各方面的影响之下，其实是一种必然的结果！”
“就像是秦国统一天下！这其实就是历史的必然！”
“那汉武帝抗击匈奴呢？其实也是必然的历史结果！”
“司马懿洛水之誓，在我们后世看来，只是司马懿个人的决定。但以当时的历史环境，司马懿是必然会违背洛水之誓的！”
“那司马昭当街杀皇帝，是不是必然的呢？”","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/ece7deedb4efd8f6822a5b0e19d3408c","author":"橘座啊","author_id":"","book_id":"7503227409445964824","book_name":"天幕：我在现代的讲解被天幕直播","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#303840","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"1.5万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":272,"name":"历史脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=272&name=历史脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":12,"name":"历史","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=12&name=历史&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":69,"name":"直播","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=69&name=直播&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":126,"name":"明朝","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=126&name=明朝&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":377,"name":"大秦","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=377&name=大秦&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7503227463640547864","read_count":"14139","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"596254"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.1","serial_count":"280","tags":"历史脑洞,历史,穿越,直播,明朝,大秦","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/a4fc2b00536d725ff90e10d2e133aa86~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779181048&x-signature=wen3Y%2B348Tcuo6O%2FqyoUHvBoWK0%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"93942370218","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"136"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603201657282C7E867DAA09873D9580"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"8","score_suffix_text":"阅读8小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":10,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_dura
